betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Flashgold§f

§aGold transmuted by balefire — a powerful RBMK fuel component!§f

§bFlashgold§f (also known as §bBalefire Gold§f) is a billet of gold that has been exposed to and transmuted by balefire. It appears as a golden billet with a green glow, retaining some of the balefire's exotic properties.

§6Production§f:
Flashgold is produced by transmuting §bGold§f using §bBalefire§f. The process is similar to euphemium production but uses gold instead of schrabidium clusters.

§6Uses§f:
§b• §bRBMK Fuel§f — Flashgold RBMK fuel pellets (hbm:rbmk_pellet_balefire_gold) are extremely powerful nuclear fuel
§b• §bFlashlead§f — related transmutation product from lead
§b• §bCustom Nukes§f — contributes to balefire stage

§eTip§f: Flashgold fuel pellets are among the most energy-dense fuels in the mod. Process them in an RBMK for massive power generation. However, make sure you have adequate cooling and containment — balefire-based fuels are extremely volatile!
